scientificName: Boswellia sacra (related species also yield frankincense)
habitat: Arid rocky slopes of the Horn of Africa (Somalia) and southern Arabia (Oman, Yemen).
traditionalUsesEn: Incense in religious ritual; traditional use for inflammatory joint complaints (resin/extracts of Boswellia species); perfume and embalming historically.
traditionalUsesDe: Räucherwerk in religiösen Ritualen; traditionell bei entzündlichen Gelenkbeschwerden (Harz/Extrakte von Boswellia-Arten); historisch Parfüm und Einbalsamierung.
activeCompounds: Boswellic acids (in Boswellia resins), essential oil monoterpenes and sesquiterpenes
preparation: Burned as incense; resin extracts in modern herbal products (often B. serrata from India also used clinically).
cautions: Quality and species vary in trade. Internal extracts: professional guidance; possible gastrointestinal side effects and drug interactions.
floweringSeason: Unknown (variable; trees flower seasonally in arid habitats)
historicalNotes: One of the gifts in the Christian Nativity narrative; ancient incense trade linked Somalia and Arabia to Mediterranean empires.
habitatDe: Arid Felsenhänge von die Horn von Afrika (Somalia) und southern Arabia (Oman, Yemen).
activeCompoundsDe: Boswellic acids (in Boswellia resins), ätherisches Öl monoterpenes und sesquiterpenes
preparationDe: Burned as incense; Harz Extrakte in modern herbal products (often B. serrata von Indien also used clinically).
cautionsDe: Quality und species vary in trade. Internal Extrakte: fachlicher Anleitung; möglich gastrointestinal side effects und Arzneimittelwechselwirkungen.
floweringSeasonDe: Unbekannt (variable; trees Blüte seasonally in arid habitats)
historicalNotesDe: One von die gifts in die Christian Nativity narrative; ancient incense trade linked Somalia und Arabia zu Mittelmeergebiet empires.
